normal: a clean image  with a normal, defect-free surface and no abnormality
crack: an image  showing a thin cracked line splitting the surface apart
scratch_abrasion: an image  showing a shallow scratch or abrasion mark scraped across the surface
cut: an image  showing a sharp straight cut slicing through the material
hole_perforation: an image  showing a small hole or puncture where material is missing and the background shows through
dent_depression: an image  showing a dented, pushed-in depression on the surface
protrusion_bump_bulge: an image  showing a raised bump or bulge protruding outward from the surface
swelling: an image  showing a swollen, puffed-up region rising above the surrounding surface
bending_deformation: an image  showing a structure that is still continuous but bent or warped out of alignment
asymmetry_shape_imbalance: an image  showing an asymmetric region with an unevenly balanced shape
irregular_contour_boundary_distortion: an image  showing a boundary contour that is irregular and distorted in outline
crease_fold: an image  showing a creased or folded line pressed into the material
embedded_particle_lint: an image  showing a foreign particle or piece of lint embedded on the surface
bubble_inclusion: an image  showing a trapped air bubble bulging beneath the surface
burn: an image  showing a burned or scorched discolored mark
thermal_melt: an image  showing a melted, softened region caused by heat damage
imprint_defect: an image  showing a smudged or misaligned printed imprint
color_change: an image  showing a discolored  whose color differs from the surrounding area
brightness_increase: an image  showing an unusually bright, overexposed-looking spot
brightness_decrease: an image  showing an unusually dark, shadowed-looking spot
opacity_density_increase: an image  showing a denser, more opaque-looking  than its surroundings
opacity_density_decrease: an image  showing a thinner, more transparent or sparse-looking  than its surroundings
